titel.label: Titel des Vorschlags
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

kategorie.label: Kategorie
kategorie.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

betroffener_bereich.label: Betroffener Bereich
betroffener_bereich.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung des Vorschlags
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

screenshots.label: Screenshots
screenshots.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a0d57d1b2df9e9b5d107877/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

einreicher_vorname.label: Vorname
einreicher_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

einreicher_nachname.label: Nachname
einreicher_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

einreichungsdatum.label: Datum der Einreichung
einreichungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

bearbeiter_vorname.label: Bearbeiter Vorname
bearbeiter_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bearbeiter_nachname.label: Bearbeiter Nachname
bearbeiter_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

umsetzungskommentar.label: Kommentar zur Umsetzung
umsetzungskommentar.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

erledigungsdatum.label: Erledigungsdatum
erledigungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.
